site.title: Alex Esposito · Data & Analytics Consultant
site.description: Data & Analytics consultant specialising in Salesforce, Power BI, CRM data quality and automation. A portfolio of shipped work from revenue, CRM and process-mining engagements.

hero.titleAfter: into clear, reliable insights for management.
hero.description: Data & Analytics consultant at Accenture. I work with revenue teams on Salesforce implementations, Power BI cockpits, data-quality programs and automations. This site is a portfolio of that work.

services.title: Four disciplines, one thread: decisions leaders can defend.
services.description: The work spans implementation, analytics, data quality and process discovery, usually in combination on the same account.

items.title: Salesforce Analytics
items.body: Pipeline models, forecasting, stage audits and custom reporting that scales beyond the standard Salesforce toolkit.

items.title: Power BI
items.body: Executive cockpits, semantic models, and DAX that answer the questions on the agenda — not just the ones in the data.

items.title: CRM Data Quality
items.body: Quantify the mess, set an index, assign owners, and build the automations that keep it clean in production.

items.title: Revenue Ops Enablement
items.body: From spreadsheets to governed pipelines — so board numbers are trusted and teams get their week back.

items.title: Process Mining
items.body: Discover how processes actually run — not how the handbook says. Event-log analysis with Fluxicon Disco to surface bottlenecks, rework loops, and margin-eating variants.

demo.title: A dashboard designed around decisions, not charts.
demo.description: Filter by region to see how a well-modelled pipeline reveals where revenue really comes from — and where it silently stalls.

insight.label: Insight
insight.apac: APAC pipeline grew 17% but win rate is down 1.4pp. Stage-skipping on Enterprise deals correlates with slippage — worth a coaching moment.
insight.emea: EMEA leads closed-won growth. Win rate up on mid-market; Enterprise cycle stretched to 91 days — expected given Q1 renewal load.
insight.amer: AMER pipeline steady; stalled bucket grew 12% WoW. Recommend re-engagement plays on the 14 deals >45d without activity.
insight.all: Pipeline up 12.5% MoM across regions. €3.8M is flagged as stalled — 62% of it sits with 9 reps who missed activity SLAs this month.

demo.disclaimer: Figures illustrative. Real engagements ship production dashboards with governed data and signed-off definitions.

projectsPreview.title: Case studies, not screenshots.
projectsPreview.description: Each engagement written up as the sponsor would tell it: problem, data, solution, impact.

process.title: A 6-week, fixed-scope shape.
process.description: Most of the work on this site followed the same shape: scoped to end, named deliverables, week-by-week cadence, hand-off the team owns.

steps.title: Decision map
steps.body: Interview sponsors, map every question the deliverable has to answer, and agree the success metric before touching data.

steps.title: Data contract
steps.body: Profile the source systems, quantify quality, and lock definitions with the people who own the upstream fields.

steps.title: Build & test
steps.body: Incremental models, governed measures, and unit tests on every KPI. Nothing ships without a test.

steps.title: Handover
steps.body: Docs, runbook, and a training session. The team owns it on Monday — a 2-week warranty follows.

chatBanner.title: Prefer a conversation over scrolling?
chatBanner.description: There is a chatbot trained on my profile, projects and stack. Ask it about a specific case study, which tools I use, or how I approach a problem — in English or in Italian.
chatBanner.hint: Replies are AI-generated from my own notes.

projectsPage.metaTitle: Work — Case studies in data, analytics & CRM
projectsPage.metaDescription: Case studies across Salesforce analytics, Power BI, CRM data quality and revenue operations.
projectsPage.description: Each study follows the same structure: the business problem, the data we had, what we built, and the impact once it was in production.

aboutPage.metaDescription: From Salesforce CPQ to data, analytics and automation. How I got here and how I think about the work.
aboutPage.titleAfter: — the same goal: decisions leaders can defend.
aboutPage.intro: I am {name}, a Data & Analytics consultant at Accenture, based in {location}. I started in 2020 implementing Salesforce (CPQ, Service, Sales), then moved into analytics, data quality and automation.
now: Process mining with Fluxicon Disco on opportunity lifecycles — turning event logs into automations that cut idle time.
Refining a CRM data-quality scorecard that scales across regions without becoming yet another dashboard no one opens.
Experimenting with AI assistants over governed Power BI datasets — useful answers, not hallucinated ones.
aboutPage.principlesTitle: How I think about the work

principles.title: Decisions first, data second.
principles.body: Before any modelling, I map the decisions the deliverable has to support. Everything else follows.

principles.title: Explainable beats clever.
principles.body: A score a team overrides is worthless. I choose approaches the business can defend in their own words.

principles.title: End with ownership, not dependency.
principles.body: Docs, tests, a runbook, and a training session. The team should own it on Monday.

principles.title: Numbers with a named owner.
principles.body: Every metric has a definition, a test, and a human who signs off on it. That is how trust compounds.

blogPage.metaTitle: Writing — Notes on data, analytics & RevOps
blogPage.metaDescription: Essays on Salesforce forecasting, Power BI design, CRM data quality and the operating habits behind trusted analytics.
blogPage.description: Short essays on the decisions behind the charts — forecasting, data quality, dashboard design, and the boring habits that make analytics actually trusted. Syndicated from Medium.

footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js, Tailwind, Framer Motion. Deployed on Vercel.

notFound.title: This page stalled in stage 0.
notFound.description: The URL does not exist — or the data model moved. Head back to the case studies or pick up where you left off.

chat.title: Chat with Alex
chat.subtitle: Data & analytics consultant — usually replies in a few seconds.
chat.greeting: Hey — I'm Alex (well, a chatbot trained on my profile). Ask me anything about the projects, the stack, or how I'd approach a specific problem. Direi che qui puoi anche scrivermi in italiano.
chat.placeholder: Ask about Salesforce, Power BI, forecasting…
suggestions: Tell me about the Salesforce project
Which Power BI engagement should I read first?
Are you more technical or business?
chat.error: Something broke on my side. Try again in a moment.
chat.disclaimer: AI-generated replies based on Alex's profile. Not binding.
